critic_findings.message: mock_current_user fixture uses MagicMock(id=1) — banned pattern. Writer's tests depend on this fixture for 5 of 7 test cases. Replace with a real UserResponse instance constructed from model fields.

TestListWidgetSchemas class calls list_widget_schemas() directly (handler-only unit tests). ACs 1, 3, 4, 5, 6 are exercised without HTTP round-trip. Review brief explicitly prohibits handler-only unit tests as sufficient. All schema-content assertions must go through AsyncClient + ASGI transport.

AC2 auth-wiring test uses dependency_overrides[get_current_user] = lambda: None — still bypasses auth. There is no test that hits the route with NO override to confirm get_current_user is actually wired into the handler. If Depends(get_current_user) were deleted from the signature, this test would still pass.
